common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

layout.title: Parego - Chess Tournament Pairing
layout.description: Pair. Play. Go. Simple over-the-board chess tournament management with instant pairing and easy join links.

home.headline: Find or run an over-the-board chess tournament
home.subheadline: Join nearby tournaments, create your own, and pair rounds instantly.
home.heroSubtitle: Find one, view it, or join—no signup required to browse.
home.registerToCreate: Register to create your own tournament.
home.gettingLocationHint: We use it only to show nearby tournaments. Allow access to see what's happening around you.
home.noTournamentsHint: Try a different radius or join with a code below.
home.locationOffHint: We need location to show tournaments near you. You can still browse recent tournaments or join with a code. To actually join and play, you'll need to be at the venue.
home.signupPrompt: Create and run tournaments, track your progress

auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your account.
auth.loginErrorGeneric: An error occurred while logging in.
auth.signupDescription: Sign up to save your games and ratings.
auth.loginClaimSingle: {count} past game linked to your account.
auth.loginClaimMultiple: {count} past games linked to your account.
auth.signupConfirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
auth.stepEmailSubtitle: We'll use this to sign you in
auth.stepLevelSubtitle: Helps with pairings. You can change this later.

conversionPrompt.repeat_play_description: Create an account to save your history and ratings.
conversionPrompt.result_rankings_description: Create an account to keep your record.
conversionPrompt.rated_game_title: You're about to play a rated game
conversionPrompt.rated_game_description: Create an account to track your rating.

ratingBands.around_1500: I once heard I was about 1500

join.title: Join tournament
join.alreadyJoined: You are already registered for this tournament.
join.locationCheckInfo: Location unavailable. You can still join; the organizer will confirm you at the venue.
join.notAtVenueInfo: You're not at the venue yet. You can still join; the organizer will confirm you when you arrive.
join.errorTournamentEnded: This tournament has ended. You can no longer join.
join.errorLateJoinNotAllowed: This tournament is already in progress and late joins are not allowed.
join.errorGuestNameRequired: Please enter your name for the pairings board.
join.errorRatingBandRequired: Please choose how you'd describe your strength.
join.errorAlreadyJoined: You have already joined this tournament.
join.errorNameTaken: {name} already exists in this tournament. Try a different name, e.g. {name} R. or {name} (Madrid).

create.title: Create tournament
create.subtitle: Set up a new chess event
create.visibilityPublicHelp: Anyone can find this tournament in nearby search.
create.visibilityPrivateHelp: Only accessible via direct link or QR code.
create.startTimeHelp: Helps players find your tournament. You can start anytime regardless of this setting.
create.pairingAllVsAllDescription: Every player faces every other player.
create.pairingArenaBalancedDescription: Players matched on result and strength.
create.pairingComparisonIntro: Compare how All vs All and Arena would have paired players differently using this tournament's actual results.
create.timeControlDefault: Default: 5 min + 3 sec increment per move
create.errorBaseTimeRange: Base time must be between 1 and 300 minutes.
create.errorIncrementRange: Increment must be between 0 and 180 seconds.
create.errorCreate: Failed to create tournament. Please try again.

arena.endTournamentConfirm: Are you sure you want to end the tournament?
arena.endTournamentWithPending: There are {count} active matches. How would you like to proceed?
arena.waitingForResultsBanner: Waiting for final results... No new pairings will be created.
arena.alertPlayerAlreadyInTournament: This player is already in the tournament.
arena.alertLateJoinsNotAllowed: Late joins are not allowed in this tournament. Please wait for the next tournament.
arena.alertTournamentAlreadyCompleted: This tournament has already been completed and cannot be restarted.
arena.alertNeedAtLeastTwoPlayers: Need at least 2 players to start.
arena.alertInvalidTableCount: Please enter a valid number of tables (at least 1).
arena.alertInvalidDuration: Please enter a valid tournament duration (at least 1 minute).
arena.alertSelfPauseNotAllowed: Self-pause is not allowed in this tournament.
arena.alertMinGamesBeforePause: Players must complete at least {count} games before pausing.
arena.alertOnlyOwnMatches: You can only submit results for your own matches.
arena.alertMissingPlayerSession: Your session is missing (no player ID). Please rejoin the tournament using the join link.
arena.toastResultSubmitFailed: Failed to submit result. Please try again.
arena.toastResultSubmitFailedNetwork: Failed to submit result. Check your connection and try again.
arena.allUniquePairingsCompleteMessage: All unique pairings are complete; repeat pairings are now happening.
arena.setupPlayersNeedTables: {players} players • Need {tables} tables for full pairings
arena.waitingForOrganizer: Waiting for the organizer to start
arena.noActivePairings: No active pairings. Waiting for more players to be available.
arena.toastTournamentEndedNoJoin: This tournament has ended. You can no longer join.
arena.toastAlreadyInTournament: You are already in this tournament
arena.toastAlreadyJoinedFromDevice: You've already joined this tournament from this device.
arena.toastAskOrganizerMarkPresent: Location unavailable. Ask the organizer to mark you present at the venue.
arena.toastLocationUnavailableStillJoin: Location unavailable. You can still join; the organizer will confirm you at the venue.
arena.toastNotAtVenueYet: You're not at the venue yet. You can still join; the organizer will confirm you when you arrive.
arena.resubmitOrOrganizerResolve: You can re-submit below, or the organizer will resolve this.
arena.waitingForOpponentSubmit: Waiting for opponent to submit result. If they don't, you can report your score to the tournament organizer.
arena.opponentSubmittedConfirmYours: Your opponent has submitted a result. Please confirm or enter your result.
arena.simulatorDescription: Automatically enter random results for testing
arena.simulatorBatchHelp: How many results to enter at once
arena.toastTablesFull: Cannot join: all {count} tables are full.
arena.toastPlayerNameAlreadyInTournament: A player with this name is already in the tournament.
arena.toastNameExistsTryDifferent: {name} already exists in this tournament. Try a different name, e.g. {name} R. or {name} (city).
arena.alertCannotAddPlayerTables: Cannot add player: Maximum simultaneous pairings ({max}) would exceed available tables ({tables}).
arena.alertNotEnoughTables: Not enough tables! With {players} players, you need at least {tables} tables for all possible simultaneous pairings.
arena.alertStartTournamentFailed: Failed to start tournament. Please try again.

currentRound.notifiedWhenReady: You'll be notified when your next match is ready

results.noMatchesYet: No matches yet. Start a tournament to begin.
results.tournamentEndedNoResults: Tournament has ended. No more results can be recorded.

tournamentHeader.deleteTournamentDescription: The entire tournament, player results and standings will be eliminated.

profile.title: Profile
profile.errorGeneric: An error occurred while updating your profile.

nearby.title: Nearby tournaments
nearby.enableLocation: Enable location to discover nearby tournaments.
nearby.errorSetLocationOrEnableGps: Please set your location in your profile or enable browser location services.
nearby.errorLoginRequired: Please log in to use this feature.
nearby.errorNoGeolocation: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
nearby.errorLoadTournaments: Failed to load tournaments. Please try again.

notFound.title: Tournament not found
notFound.description: The tournament you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.

settings.title: Tournament Settings
settings.descriptionOrganizer: Customize scoring, pairing rules, and player management
settings.descriptionViewer: View tournament configuration (organizer only can edit)
settings.streakEnabledHelp: After 2 consecutive wins, multiply all points
settings.allowSelfPauseHelp: Players can pause themselves during tournament
settings.allowLateJoinHelp: New players can join after tournament starts
settings.avoidRecentRematchesHelp: Games since last match (0 = allow immediate)
settings.allowRematchToReduceWaitHelp: When no new pairings exist, allow rematches so players don't wait too long
settings.colorBalanceHelp: On — pairing favors balanced white/black assignment.
settings.showSimulatorHelp: Show auto-simulator in Results tab for testing
settings.autoEndAtCompletionHelp: Automatically end when most unique pairings played
settings.resetConfirm: Reset all settings to default values?
